case_title: JESSICA TRITES et al VS. JOHNNY MARTINEZ et al

docket_entries.description: ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR APR-20-2004 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST MICHAEL J. MANDEL, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: APR-20-2004 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-05-2004. REPORTED BY: LESLEY LETTE. CSR#10580 (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRITES, JESSICA MANN, MATTHEW SERVED JUN-05-2004, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, JOHNNY

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-23-2004 CONTINUED TO OCT-25-2004 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) LINDA OLIVER; OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). AUG-23-2004 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
